message.content:
{
   "assessment_framework": {
     "marks_distribution": [
       "Unit I: Chemical Substances - Nature and Behaviour (25 Marks)",
       "Unit II: World of Living (25 Marks)",
       "Unit III: Natural Phenomena (12 Marks)",
       "Unit IV: Effects of Current (13 Marks)",
       "Unit V: Natural Resources (5 Marks)",
       "Total Theory Marks: 80",
       "Internal Assessment: 20 Marks",
       "Grand Total: 100 Marks"
     ],
     "question_paper_design": [
       "Time: 03 Hours",
       "Marks: 80 (Theory)",
       "Typology of Questions: VSA (including objective type), Assertion-Reasoning, SA, LA, Source-based/Case-based/Passage-based/Integrated assessment questions",
       "Internal Choice: Approximately 33%"
     ],
     "competency_weightage": [
       "Demonstrate Knowledge and Understanding: 50%",
       "Application of Knowledge/Concepts: 30%",
       "Formulate, Analyze, Evaluate and Create: 20%"
     ],
     "bloom_levels": [
       "Demonstrate Knowledge and Understanding (State, name, list, identify, define, suggest, describe, outline, summarize)",
       "Application of Knowledge/Concepts (Calculate, illustrate, show, adapt, explain, distinguish)",
       "Formulate, Analyze, Evaluate and Create (Interpret, analyze, compare, contrast, examine, evaluate, discuss, construct)"
     ],
     "internal_assessment": [
       "Periodic Assessment: 05 marks + 05 marks",
       "Subject Enrichment (Practical Work): 05 marks",
       "Portfolio: 05 marks",
       "Total Internal Assessment: 20 Marks"
     ],
     "practical_assessment": [
       "List of Experiments (14 items covering Units I, II, III, IV)",
       "Assessment of Practical Skills in Science - Class X (CBSE Publication)",
       "Topics assessed formatively only: Periodic Classification of Elements, Heredity and Evolution, Electric Effects of Electric Current (Portfolio/Periodic Assessment credit)"
     ],
     "project_assessment": [
       "Portfolio preparation for non-examined topics (Periodic Classification, Heredity & Evolution, Electric Effects)",
       "Brief write-up on assigned topics",
       "Joyful and experiential opportunities for internal assessment"
     ]
   }
}
